criteria.label: Implementation Effort
criteria.description: Time and internal resources required to configure and deploy the CRM.

criteria.label: Integration Capability
criteria.description: Ability to connect with existing consultancy tools and data stacks.

criteria.label: Total Cost of Ownership
criteria.description: Combined costs of licensing, implementation, and ongoing maintenance.

criteria.label: GDPR Compliance
criteria.description: Adherence to EU data protection regulations and privacy standards.

criteria.label: Data Residency
criteria.description: Requirement for data to be hosted and processed within the EU.

criteria.label: Vendor Stability
criteria.description: Financial health and long-term viability of the CRM provider.

criteria.label: Sustainability Credentials
criteria.description: Alignment of the vendor's environmental practices with consultancy standards.
